metadata.title: MobiFit - Workout tracking, challenges and AI
metadata.description: Track your workouts, stay motivated with challenges and use AI agents to improve your routine.

banner.title: Transforme seus treinos com o MobiFit!
banner.description: Organize your routine, follow your progress, rely on AI agents for guidance and use challenges to stay motivated.

amazing.title: Discover the power of MobiFit
amazing.challenges: Motivational challenges: join solo or group challenges, track rankings and use goals to stay engaged with your training.
amazing.offline: Offline tracking: your workout library and training plans stay available even when your internet connection is unstable.
amazing.library: Exercise library: find real videos from professionals, along with images and clear guidance to follow each movement with confidence.
amazing.ai: AI agents: create your personalized workout and diet, adjust your routine and get help for your goals.
amazing.privacy: Sign-in is optional for most features outside groups, and you can delete your data directly in the app whenever you want.

home.eyebrow: Workout tracking, AI agents and challenges in one app
home.featureTitle: Built for people who want to train better and stay consistent
home.featureDescription: MobiFit helps you track workouts, follow your progress and keep momentum with practical tools for everyday training.
home.showcaseTitle: Everything you need to manage your training routine in one place
home.showcaseDescription: From planning to execution, the app brings together workouts, progress, motivation and AI support in one flow.

group.title: You have been invited to a group
group.install: Install the MobiFit app and then

project.title: You have been invited to a project
project.install: Install the MobiFit app and then
